title: BCYMRK Bible (Mark)
description:
The Bacama language is spoken in the east of Nigeria in Adamawa state.
The first portion of Scripture in the language was the Gospel of Mark, which was published by the British and Foreign Bible Society at the Niger Press in Shonga in 1915.
This text was digitised with the help of MissionAssist in 2020.

language.name: Bacama
language.area: Adamawa state, Numan and Guyuk LGAs; Kaduna state, northeast of Kaduna town; Kogi state, confluence of Benue and Niger rivers.
